harness.working_tree: WIN2METAL Phase 2 (Bucket A) validation on Apple M4 16GB. Binary is the FROZEN base build /Volumes/Untitled/camelid-base-28f224b (camelid v0.1.7-92-g28f224b, commit 28f224b); no src changes in this branch. Outputs salvaged under qa/capability/mac_*_out/<row>/.
harness.e2e_harness: qa/capability/* Metal harness; outputs under qa/capability/mac_*_out/llama-3.2-1b

evidence.summary: e2e on Metal (Apple M4, GPU-resident decode active — qa/capability/mac_logprobs_out/llama-3.2-1b/serve.log shows [resident-dispatch] metal_enabled=true and per-step [resident] gpu_busy lines). WATCH ITEM RESOLVED PASS: with logprobs requested, the engine materializes FULL-VOCAB logits (the LogitsStage / ResidentTokenOut::Data path) and does NOT take the GPU-sample shortcut (ResidentTokenOut::Sampled, token-id only) — proven by the response carrying real ranked alternatives. chat: logprobs.content[] has 3 entries each with token, logprob and 5 top_logprobs; the temp=0 greedy invariant holds on Metal (chosen token == top_logprobs[0] every step, all logprobs <= 0, top sorted descending; e0 token 'Red' logprob -0.2464474). completions: logprobs.{tokens,token_logprobs,top_logprobs,text_offset} present and aligned (4 tokens, top alternative ' Paris'). Fail-closed posture preserved: logprobs+stream -> typed HTTP 400, logprobs+n>1 -> fail-closed (no choices). Values not asserted bit-exact vs the oracle (cross-impl f32 reduction-order envelope, the documented frontier). Evidence: qa/capability/mac_logprobs_out/llama-3.2-1b/chat_logprobs.json, comp_logprobs.json, lp_stream.json, lp_n.json, serve.log.
